content.en:
From the peak transcendent Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord to the half-step Legendary Realm Lord, it is very difficult to cross this step.

In the Infinite Sea, there are many Peak Transcendence Realm Legendary Lords, but half-step Legendary Realm Lords are too rare.

There is really no such force as the Holy Land, so you can see many half-step Legendary Realm Lords.

For example, the Shattered Star Lord that Ye Tian killed, but with a Legendary Realm Lord Elder, it is difficult to cultivate him to a half-step Legendary Realm Lord, and it takes a long time of hard cultivation and tempering.

And Ye Tian is the same at the moment, it will take a long time to enter the half-step Legendary Realm Lord.

After all, it is not an easy thing to completely and perfectly merge the body and the will rule heaven and earth.

Moreover, in the realm of the Legendary Lord of the Transcendence Realm, you can also buy treasures such as the Enlightenment Void Leaf and the Hengsha Blood Hoof Liquid "One Five-Zero" to quickly improve your cultivation, but at present, the treasures that can improve your body and will rules are extremely rare and almost impossible to find.

Even the Time Chamber of Commerce would be very difficult to find such a treasure.

If there really is such a treasure, the value is incomparably terrifying.

Even in the True No Holy Land, there are not many opportunities for the Peak Transcendence Realm Legendary Lord to quickly improve his strength, and there are only a few treasure lands that can increase the cultivation speed, but it is only a slight increase in the cultivation speed, which is not of much use.

"If I cultivate slowly like this, it will be too long to become a half-step Legendary Realm Lord, and in terms of cultivation speed, my current talent will not allow me to surpass others too much. The Lord of Baiheng and the Lord of Frost Free had all gone through incalculable years of penance before they stepped into the half-step legendary realm. If I had done this slowly, it would have taken me so long. "

Ye Tian muttered.

His only advantage is that once he becomes a half-step Legendary Realm, it won't be long before he can attack the Legendary Realm Lord, because he has already controlled time, and this is his advantage.

"You have to find a chance!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The great opportunity that can be suitable for the Peak Transcendence Realm Legendary Lord is really extremely rare, just like buying the kind of treasure that is suitable for the Peak Transcendence Realm Lord to quickly improve his cultivation, it is almost impossible to find.

Suddenly, Ye Tian thought of a certain treasure.

"Three thousand kites!"

The three thousand iris must be in the hands of the Black Water Lord, and with the character of the Black Water Lord, I am afraid that the three thousand iris will not be taken out.

But.

The treasure of the Three Thousand Kite Lin has a characteristic, that is, it cannot be refined, cannot be stored in the Void Ball and the inner world, and can only exist in the normal eternal heaven and earth and the void area.

Because of this, the original Moshan placed the three thousand kites in a wisp of empty treasure mountain in Moshan, and then blessed the formation to shroud and hide, and then several Legendary Realm Lords and half-step Legendary Realm Lords continued to comprehend.

It is precisely because of this that he will be stolen and defected by the Lord of Blackwater.

If it is really refined, it will inevitably be in the hands of one of the Legendary Realm Lords, and the Black Water Lord will not be able to steal it if he wants to.

"Heishui Lingzhuang must have put the three thousand iris in a certain treasure mountain of the Heishui Mountain to hide, I may be able to enter the Heishui Mountain as a member of the Heishui Mountain, so as to find an opportunity to steal the three thousand kites. "

Ye Tian muttered.

He was emulating the Blackwater Lords, but it was difficult for this plan to succeed.

First of all, the place where the three thousand iris are located is very important, and no one else will be allowed to enter, not even the Legendary Realm Lord.

Moreover, the main body of the Lord of Blackwater will inevitably stay there without a straight body, and the clone will be active in the outside world.

Therefore, how difficult it is to get in there and take away the three thousand kites!

But it's not impossible.

For example, if several Legendary Realm Lords attacked Blackwater 1L, he could take the opportunity to steal three thousand kites.

For example, if he asks a few Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Land to do this, when the time comes, he will directly share the three thousand kites, as the treasures of the True Saintless Land, and the Dragon Gu Lords will definitely be willing to help, and even say that they are very willing to help.

But the premise of everything is that the Lord of Blackwater really has three thousand kites.

Therefore, he needs to infiltrate Blackwater Mountain to find out the information.

this day.

Ye Tian had his eyes on a peak transcendent transcendent realm legendary lord in Heishui Mountain, and the other party's status in Heishui Mountain was not low.

Ye Tian was eyeing him because he didn't have a clone, so once he left Heishui Mountain, it meant that the body had left.

Otherwise, if the body of the member of Blackwater Mountain was in Blackwater Mountain, he would not be able to kill him silently.

"The Qinghuan Lord of Blackwater Mountain has come out.

Ye Tian followed this Qinghuan Lord, and appeared directly at a distance from Heishui Mountain.

"Time drips!"

Ye Tian flicked his fingers, and the time dripping directly killed the other party, and the Qinghuan Lord didn't even have a chance to react, so he was directly bombarded and killed........ ，

Immediately, Ye Tian spied into Lord Qinghuan's past and thoroughly understood this person, so he copied Lord Qinghuan's body and put on his eternal treasures and many secret treasures

Subsequently, Ye Tian spent some more years to control the eternal techniques controlled by Lord Qinghuan one by one, and since they were completely copied, Ye Tian could also control those eternal techniques.

In this way, Ye Tian's replica body was almost exactly the same as that of the Qinghuan Lord.

The difference in case is that the time and space have passed.

If a Legendary Realm Lord snooped into the past of this body, he would find clues, and this was the only flaw

But what Legendary Realm Lord has nothing to do to snoop into someone else's past?

As a result, the replica body is hardly exposed.

After everything was ready, Ye Tian came to Heishui Mountain.

With one Legendary Realm Lord, five half-step Legendary Realm Lords, and dozens of Transcendent Realm Legendary Lords, Blackwater Mountain has already broken into a powerful scale.

And Lord Qinghuan, as the legendary lord of the peak transcendence realm, is considered a top combat power in Heishui Mountain.

After entering Heishui Mountain, he almost imitated the living habits of Lord Qinghuan and gradually integrated into Heishui Mountain.

Soon after, under his exploration, he finally learned that in the central area of Blackwater Mountain, there was a retreat place for the Blackwater Lords, and no lords were allowed to approach.

0.9 Even if a Legendary Lord asks for advice from the Blackwater Lord, he can only wait in the Blackwater Temple.

Therefore, according to Ye Tian's calculations, in the central area of the Heishui 1 territory, the nameless Black Mountain should be the place where the three thousand iris are located, and it is a forbidden land.

It stands to reason that there is only one Legendary Realm Lord's power, and for the peak Legendary Realm Lord, there should be no forbidden land, but the Blackwater Lord has a forbidden land, which is not normal in itself.

"There's a 70% chance of it!"

Ye Tian estimated.

In the following years, Ye Tian slowly approached the nameless black mountain, spied on that formation, and gradually understood what kind of formation it was.

Because only by thoroughly understanding that formation can you steal three thousand kites in the future.

"It turned out to be the Legendary Realm Lord's favorite Void River Boundary Array!"

Ye Tian frowned slightly. _
